## Summary

- [ ] New reviewer axis

## Validation

How did you test this? Be specific.

- [ ] Ran `deepreview` against a real repository.
- [ ] Verified sub-agent JSON output schema is unchanged (or updated
      consumers if changed).
- [ ] Confirmed the read-only contract still holds (no writes outside
      `.claude/review/<run-id>/`).
- [ ] Updated README / SKILL.md / agent description if behavior
      changed.

## Backwards compatibility

Does this change break any existing behavior? If yes, describe the
migration path.
